title: ChatGPT如何在保护隐私的同时学习世界知识
title_en: How ChatGPT learns about the world while protecting privacy
summary: 本文介绍了OpenAI在ChatGPT训练中减少个人数据使用、通过差分隐私等技术保护用户隐私，并赋予用户控制对话是否用于改进模型的权利。文章详细说明了数据最小化、匿名化处理以及用户选择退出机制等具体措施。The article explains how OpenAI minimizes personal data in ChatGPT training, uses techniques like differential privacy to protect user privacy, and gives users control over whether their conversations improve AI models. It details specific measures such as data minimization, anonymization, and opt-out mechanisms.
